problem_statement: The existing floating WhatsApp button (#wa-float in BaseLayout.astro) is mobile-only (hidden on desktop), scroll-gated (appears only after 30% scroll), icon-only (no visible label), and language-agnostic (no RedBook option for Chinese visitors).
solution_strategy: Create a dedicated ContactFloat.astro component that is always visible on all screen sizes and locales, shows WhatsApp for es/en and RedBook for zh, with a hover-expanding pill label, then replace the old inline #wa-float block in BaseLayout.astro.
entry_point: Fixed bottom-right floating action button rendered via BaseLayout.astro on all pages (/, /en/, /zh/)
user_story: As a prospective expedition client visiting in English, Spanish, or Chinese, I want a persistent contact button visible in the corner of every page so I can instantly start a conversation on WhatsApp or RedBook.

files_to_change.purpose: Self-contained floating contact FAB component — WhatsApp for es/en, RedBook for zh — with CSS hover-expand pill label
Import ContactFloat, add <ContactFloat lang={lang} /> render, remove old #wa-float <a>, <style>, and <script> blocks

phases.name: i18n Keys
tasks: Add contact.float.label_whatsapp = 'Escribinos por WhatsApp' to es.ts
Add contact.float.aria_whatsapp = 'Contactar por WhatsApp' to es.ts
Add contact.float.label_whatsapp = 'Chat on WhatsApp' to en.ts
Add contact.float.aria_whatsapp = 'Contact via WhatsApp' to en.ts
Add contact.float.label_redbook = '小红书联系' to zh.ts
Add contact.float.aria_redbook = '通过小红书联系我' to zh.ts

phases.name: Create ContactFloat.astro Component
tasks: Create src/components/ContactFloat.astro
Accept lang prop ('es' | 'en' | 'zh')
Use useTranslations(lang) internally
Conditionally render WhatsApp (es/en) or RedBook (zh) FAB
CSS: fixed bottom-right, always visible, pill expand on hover, reduced-motion support
Reuse existing cta.whatsapp_url translation key for WhatsApp href

phases.name: Integration in BaseLayout.astro
tasks: Add import ContactFloat from '../components/ContactFloat.astro' in frontmatter
Add <ContactFloat lang={lang} /> in <body> at same position as old #wa-float
Remove old <a id='wa-float'> element
Remove old <style> block for #wa-float
Remove old <script> scroll-listener for #wa-float

phases.name: Quality & Validation
tasks: Run: npm run build
Run: npx astro check
Run: npm run preview
Execute manual verification script (all 3 locales, desktop + mobile)

design_decisions: WhatsApp for ES and EN — primary contact channel for Spanish and English-speaking climbers
RedBook (小红书) for ZH — preferred social/messaging platform for Chinese users, consistent with existing Social component which already shows RedBook only for ZH locale
No scroll threshold — FAB visible immediately on page load (current implementation gates it behind 30% scroll which reduces discoverability)
Visible on all screen sizes — current implementation is mobile-only (max-width: 768px), new implementation removes this restriction
Hover-expand pill — balances minimal footprint (icon only) with discoverability (label on hover), CSS-only animation with reduced-motion fallback
Reuses cta.whatsapp_url translation key — avoids duplicating phone number across i18n files
CSS custom properties for colors — allows clean theming without duplication
assumptions: RedBook link (https://xhslink.com/m/9PhDmNJh0DB) is current and valid — verify with client
WhatsApp number +57 314 629 4318 is current — verify with client
ZH locale visitors are the primary RedBook audience; EN/ES visitors prefer WhatsApp
No A/B testing or analytics tracking required on the FAB clicks (can be added later)
integration_requirements: MANUAL: Remove the entire #wa-float block from BaseLayout.astro (3 sections: <a>, <style>, <script>)
MANUAL: Add ContactFloat import to BaseLayout.astro frontmatter
MANUAL: Place <ContactFloat lang={lang} /> in BaseLayout.astro body
